distinctive_elements: level select system similar to Mega Man
multiple themed environments: Niagara Falls, Bermuda Triangle, Mu, Egypt, Scotland
interactive objects: levers, cannons, springy flowers, hooks, rafts

notes: No specific sprite dimensions, color palette counts, or animation frame data documented in available sources. Game developed by Capcom with artist Keiji Inafune. TASVideos contains memory addresses and debugging info but no visual design specs. Speedrun.com provides gameplay info only. Sources confirm late NES era production (June 1993 NA release) with regional variations in title screen design.
